entities.name: COVID-19
entities.description: A pandemic that affected health and economies globally, impacting Asian agrifood systems and food security

entities.name: ASIAN AGRIFOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming and food systems across Asian countries, categorized into four principal types

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agrifood systems to recover from and adapt to shocks like COVID-19

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to food and nutrients for a healthy life

entities.name: RECOVERY POLICIES
entities.description: Government-led strategies aimed at restoring economic and agricultural performance post-pandemic

entities.name: CONCEPTUAL SYSTEMS MODEL
entities.description: A framework used to link direct and indirect effects of COVID-19 to system resilience and performance

entities.name: LOWLAND RICE BASED SYSTEM
entities.description: One of the four principal Asian farming and food systems based on lowland rice production

entities.name: IRRIGATED WHEAT BASED SYSTEM
entities.description: One of the four principal Asian farming and food systems based on irrigated wheat production

entities.name: HILL MIXED SYSTEM
entities.description: One of the four principal Asian farming and food systems characterized by mixed farming in hilly regions

entities.name: DRYLAND MIXED SYSTEM
entities.description: One of the four principal Asian farming and food systems based on mixed farming in dryland regions

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method involving 2504 key informants across 20 Asian countries

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the assessed agrifood systems are located

entities.name: GOVERNMENT POLICIES
entities.description: Public policies that prioritize food availability, affordability, and staple food production

entities.name: FOOD AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The physical presence of food in a region

entities.name: AFFORDABILITY
entities.description: The economic accessibility of food for the population

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the living of people in rural areas

entities.name: LOCAL LABOUR MARKETS
entities.description: Markets for employment within local rural areas, including off-farm work

entities.name: FARM PRODUCE MARKETS
entities.description: Markets where agricultural products, especially perishables, are sold

entities.name: INPUT SUPPLY CHAINS
entities.description: The systems for delivering agricultural inputs like seeds and fertilisers to farmers

entities.name: SEEDS
entities.description: Essential agricultural inputs for crop production

entities.name: FERTILISERS
entities.description: Chemical or organic substances added to soil to increase crop yield

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of crops or having multiple income sources to reduce risk

entities.name: EXTERNAL INPUTS
entities.description: Agricultural inputs sourced from outside the farm system

entities.name: MARKET CHAINS
entities.description: The sequence of processes and actors involved in moving food from farm to consumer

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of farming systems to maintain productivity and health over the long term

entities.name: ECONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The financial health and recovery rate of the agrifood systems

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production in farming systems

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES STATUS
entities.description: The condition of land, water, and other natural assets used in farming

entities.name: SOCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: The networks of relationships among people who live and work in a particular society

entities.name: STAPLE FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of primary food crops that form the basis of the diet

entities.name: DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The process of making food available to consumers

entities.name: WELFARE PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Government initiatives to provide financial or social support to vulnerable populations

entities.name: ZOONOSES
entities.description: Infectious diseases that are transmitted between animals and humans

entities.name: PLANT- AND ANIMAL-SOURCED FOOD SUPPLIES
entities.description: The total supply of food derived from plants and animals

used to assess the effects of COVID-19 on
